description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 1 operating-discipline pack, change-governance cluster: diff/staging hygiene vs classification vs approval vs closeout.

cases.prompt: Help me stage exactly the files for this fix — the tree has a bunch of unrelated changes too.
cases.reason: Exact-path staging in a mixed tree is the core of diff discipline.

cases.prompt: Before I start this change, what class of change is it and what validation will it need?
cases.reason: Pre-work routing, not in-flight diff hygiene.

cases.prompt: The work is done and committed — write up what changed, what wasn't done, and what was tested.
cases.reason: Terminal reporting belongs to the closeout reporter; diff discipline only feeds it parked items.

cases.prompt: This PR was supposed to be a one-line fix and now it touches 14 files — trim it back to the intent.
cases.reason: Diff-drift correction while the change is still being shaped.
